title: cert-3 home-link stabilization was already fixed before the run — verify tree before scoping
content: Seed sdlc2/ai-bookkeeper-cert-3 asked to convert a raw  to next/link  in src/app/page.tsx. Empirical check of the committed tree: the fix was ALREADY present (page.tsx:13 = , next/link imported at line 2), eslint . exits 0 (GREEN), and a behavioral regression guard e2e/home-nav.spec.ts was already committed (b510ec9), with ADR-0006 Accepted for the same seed. Correct architect move = NO new engineering task (would contradict ADR-0006 + cause churn); scope only the downstream PATCH release. Lesson: in stabilization/handoff mode, ALWAYS read the actual file + run the named gate (lint) before trusting the seed's defect description — seeds can describe debt that a prior cascade already cleared. Version detail: non-functional fix on 0.4.0 = PATCH 0.4.1, not the seed's '0.5.x' (0.5.0 would be MINOR).

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-28 21:59 UTC
ADR 0005 surfaced for triage: formatMoney has 0 consumers — ADR 0004 guarantee unrealized in product
content: Standalone backlog scan of ai-bookkeeper (HEAD b510ec9) surfaced ADR 0005 (money-formatting consolidation, Proposed). Empirically verified: the ADR-blessed formatMoney (ADR 0004, currency/locale-aware, roundMoney-normalized, fail-loud) has ZERO product consumers — only the ledger barrel re-exports it. Every visible balance instead flows through src/lib/format.ts formatCurrency/formatSignedCurrency (USD-only, no normalization, no fail-loud) across 9 call-sites in 8 files (benchmarks, customers, tax-credits, wealth-score, ledger TransactionsCard), plus a third inline path at WealthScoreCard.tsx:195-196. So ADR 0004's central guarantee is unrealized in the product — the gap is ADOPTION, not new primitives. Proposed fix: promote primitives to src/lib/money kernel, wrap legacy formatters over formatMoney(_,'USD') for zero day-one churn, re-point consumers, add lint guardrail. IMPORTANT scope correction: ADR 0005's Task 6 (page.tsx →Link lint fix) is STALE — ADR 0006 confirmed page.tsx:12 already uses Link and eslint . exits 0; the recurring page.tsx blocker that gated ADR-0004/cert-2 is now CLOSED. Held for human triage (standalone, not a team handoff; status Proposed → explicit accept required before implementation).

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-28 22:06 UTC
ADR 0005 money-kernel consolidation — standalone triage surfaced, NOT implemented; Task 6 confirmed stale
content: ai-bookkeeper standalone backlog scan (event dev-clone.backlog.candidate, HEAD b510ec9) re-surfaced two candidates for human triage. Correctly held at triage (no team_handoff/ADR work-order this run) per 'never implement without explicit triage accept'. Empirically reconfirmed ADR 0005's premise: formatMoney (ADR 0004, src/features/ledger/lib/format.ts:74) is ORPHANED — 0 product consumers — while USD-only formatCurrency/formatSignedCurrency (src/lib/format.ts) is used at 9 call-sites across 8 files (benchmarks x2, customers x2, tax-credits x2, wealth-score, ledger/TransactionsCard), plus a 3rd inline path at WealthScoreCard.tsx:195-196. So ADR 0004's 'what you see = what's stored' guarantee is unrealized in product. KEY: ADR 0005 Task 6 (page.tsx →) is STALE — already fixed, eslint . exits 0 — so scope is Tasks 1-5 = 11 pts (not 12). bl-hk1: docs/adr/0005 + 0006 both untracked (0006 code shipped in b510ec9 but doc never committed). Recommended accept both. Guardrail for when accepted: keep suite 42/42, preserve U+2212 minus in formatSignedCurrency golden test, use back-compat wrappers for incremental migration.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-28 22:08 UTC
ADR-0006 home-nav e2e guard reviewed APPROVE (b510ec9, ai-bookkeeper)
content: Reviewed commit b510ec9 (test(e2e): add home-nav regression guard [ADR-0006]) on ai-bookkeeper — triggered by a backlog-scan handoff that implemented no code, so I reviewed the latest LANDED changeset (post-dates my ADR-0004/12bc223 review). Verdict APPROVE: test-only addition e2e/home-nav.spec.ts (+45), page.tsx untouched. No security/correctness/critical blockers. All test assumptions verified in source: header brand link is real next/link (page.tsx:13 / pricing:360 ) with 'Ledgerline' accessible name; footer 'Ledgerline' is a non-link  (pricing:429) so cannot be mis-selected; .first() pins DOM-first header link and avoids strict-mode violation; home h1 at page.tsx:84; /pricing route exists. The __noReload window-flag technique correctly distinguishes client next/link nav from full reload. Gate re-run GREEN: eslint 0, tsc 0, playwright spec 1 passed (4.6s). Build-integrity clean (spec imports only @playwright/test — no barrel/untracked-sibling trap). Two LOW non-gating notes: (L1) brand-link selector leans on /Ledgerline/+.first(), could add data-testid='brand-home' for robustness; (L2) ADJACENT pre-existing Next/Image aspect-ratio warning for /brand/logo.png in page.tsx/pricing — separate housekeeping, not a finding against this change. IMPORTANT: the page.tsx no-html-link-for-pages blocker that gated two prior ledger work orders is now CLOSED (page.tsx:13 uses , eslint 0) — do not re-flag; this commit is the behavioral guard locking it in.

content: 5th re-scan at HEAD b510ec9 (UNCHANGED since 4th scan; working tree only has untracked ADR docs 0005/0006). No new code to scan. Standing findings unchanged: (H1) postcss XSS GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 (<8.5.10) STILL OPEN — package.json STILL has NO overrides block (grep confirmed empty); top-level postcss=8.5.15 but next@16.2.6 nests postcss@8.4.31 at package-lock.json:3485, npm audit=2 moderate (postcss + next.via=['postcss'], one root cause). Fix remains one-line overrides {"postcss":">=8.5.10"}; npm's next@9.3.3 is wrong breaking downgrade. Ranked High per CVE policy, real reachability low (build-time CSS). (L1) @google/generative-ai ^0.24.1 (package.json:19) STILL unused in src. (L2 informational) layout.tsx:88 dangerouslySetInnerHTML re-verified benign — themeInitScript is static literal (layout.tsx:63-72), the only ${} in file is font-var className at line 82, NOT in the script. Rest CLEAN: 0 secrets (only .env.example tracked), 0 eval/exec/process.env in src, no api routes. Filed manual_review for the one-line overrides fix this run. COVERAGE GAP: Obsidian vault tools unavailable AGAIN (5th run). NEXT SCAN: grep package.json for overrides before re-reporting H1; if HEAD still b510ec9 skip deep re-read.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-28 22:11 UTC
ai-bookkeeper v0.5.0 SHIPPED @ 63eeb9d — prior lint hold cleared, tag cut
content: Released v0.5.0 on 2026-05-29 (MINOR, 0.4.0->0.5.0). This is the release that was HELD at 12bc223 in the prior run due to a red eslint error (@next/next/no-html-link-for-pages, raw  in src/app/page.tsx, introduced inside v0.4.0's visual v2). HOLD NOW CLEARED: page.tsx:9 uses next/link, and ADR 0006 (commit b510ec9) added a Playwright home-nav regression guard. Full gate re-run green: eslint clean, tsc clean, tsx --test 42/42, next build success (8 routes). HEAD advanced cf108a7 (was b510ec9 at security scan; 12bc223 at the hold). git log v0.4.0..HEAD = 3 feat (12bc223 formatMoney ADR0004, ac478e9 phase3 showcase, b444125 phase2 polish) + 1 test (b510ec9) + 1 docs (cf108a7), no breaking -> MINOR per pre-1.0 policy. KEY: the [Unreleased] changelog only had formatMoney+README — I folded in the undocumented phase2/phase3 features before cutting. Release commit 63eeb9d (bump+CHANGELOG+docs/releases/v0.5.0.md+ADR 0005/0006), annotated tag v0.5.0 at 63eeb9d, pushed main+tag, published GitHub Release on xkazm04/xprize-ai-bookkeeper. CARRY-FORWARD: postcss GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 still open (next@16.2.6 nests postcss@8.4.31), fix=package.json overrides {postcss:>=8.5.10}, non-blocking, already filed by security persona. LESSON confirmed: eslint is a SEPARATE gate from next build (build passes with red lint in Next 16) — always run eslint independently before tagging. Obsidian shared-vault tools unavailable again.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-28 22:16 UTC
ai-bookkeeper v0.5.0: release promoted [Unreleased] formatMoney cleanly; ingest omitted from README lib/ tree
content: When v0.5.0 was finally cut (release commit 63eeb9d, after the held lint blocker was fixed), the Release Manager pipeline pre-authored CHANGELOG [0.5.0], docs/releases/v0.5.0.md, AND a full README rewrite (cf108a7) — all accurate. CONFIRMED: the prior-run formatMoney entry I had parked under '## [Unreleased]' (while the release was held) was correctly PROMOTED into [0.5.0] with NO duplication — [Unreleased] is now empty. So parking held-but-committed trunk work in [Unreleased] is the right call; the release pipeline promotes it on tag-cut. ONLY doc gap this run: the rewritten README's src/features/ledger/lib/ file-tree comment listed round/amount/arithmetic/format but omitted ingest.ts — added it. The lib/ enumeration remains the highest-value recurring README check even after a full rewrite. LESSON: ADR files with 'Status: Proposed' (e.g. ADR 0005 money-formatting-consolidation, NOT implemented — primitives still in features/ledger/lib, src/lib/format.ts still un-normalized USD-only) are decision records, NOT shipped behavior — never document them as CHANGELOG features; only document when the implementation actually lands.
